title: TBCore Patches
description: A simple mod that is responsible for fixing bugs in mods that cause crashes and dupes.
body:
A simple mod that is responsible for fixing bugs in mods that cause crashes and dupes.

 

Currently fixed:
- Astral sorcery: fixes random crash on join to the server
- Evil Craft: fixes client crash when mouse hover at humanoid flesh
 

More patches will follow in the future!

You can use this mod everywhere.

**_Client side only._**
